title: Open World - RPG Like
description: Makes your Minecraft feel like a open world game whilst keeping the vanilla feel
body:
Open World - RPG Like aims to make your Minecraft experience into feeling like a open world game, while keeping some of that Minecraft charm. Made by @SUPERBIGGIE

Versions in Alpha stage are very early versions and Beta versions are experimental. 

For lower-end devices turning shaders and Distant Horizons off is reccomended.

It's NOT recommended to use controller in shoulder surfing mode! It's super buggy, I instead recommend going in Minecrafts built-in third person.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9294fe64871d4534db5994e6d952da6c2cc690b.jpeg)
Content in this modpack:

- Shoulder surfing
- Zooming
- RPG like origins and paths
- Improved vanilla structures
- Extra vanilla like structures
- Improved mob and player animations
- Improved end fight
- Scarier hostile mobs
- SHADERS (obviously, what did you expect?)
- Mob health bars
- Favoriting worlds
- Bedrock like bridging
- Throwable spears
- And a couple of vanilla+ mods and resourcepacks
- Controller support!

I hope yall like this modpack!
